summary: Completed frontend testing of Modern Minimalist Instagram-style UI redesign. Auth page, Home page, bottom navigation, stories bar, and post cards verified. CSS variables correctly updated to Electric Blue (#2D5BFF) primary color. Some pages (Profiles, Chat) still retain old Neo-Noir dark theme styling.

issues: Still uses Neo-Noir dark theme with cyan/teal accents instead of new Modern Minimalist light theme with Electric Blue
Still uses dark theme background instead of new Modern Minimalist light theme
Uses dark theme - may be intentional for video content viewing experience

Auth page: Apple login button visible
Auth page: Facebook login button visible

Login flow: Redirects to Home page after login
Home page: FaceConnect header logo visible

Home page: Post content and timestamp visible

Bottom Nav (Mobile): Home button (data-testid='nav-home') works
Bottom Nav (Mobile): Search button (data-testid='nav-search') works
Bottom Nav (Mobile): Create (+) button (data-testid='nav-create') works

Desktop Sidebar: Navigation items (Home, Search, Reels, Messages, Create, Settings) present
Settings page: Modern light theme with user profile info visible
CSS Variables: Light theme properly defined (--background: #FFFFFF, --text-primary: #262626)

Auth.jsx properly uses CSS variables (var(--primary), var(--background)) for consistent theming
Home.jsx implements Instagram-style layout with stories bar and post cards

success_rate.frontend: 90% (Main redesigned pages work, some pages need theme updates)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing test user.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Modern Minimalist UI redesign tested. Auth page and Home page have new Instagram-style design with Electric Blue (#2D5BFF) primary color. Bottom navigation is floating dock style with 5 tabs. Stories bar implemented. Some pages (Profiles, Chat) still use old Neo-Noir dark theme and need updating to use CSS variables. WebSocket connection warnings appear on load but are non-blocking.
